## Source: ossf-package-analysis (19041d396a96e8d46b2fd05aa6e0b2f4f1e355f01a98bd0e7a3fbc513a6f09a7)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-trusttiers-trusttier' @ 1.0.3 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
